title: War weapons
description: Medieval styled weapons and war utilities.
body:
# War Weapons - Minecraft Mod

## Description

War Weapons adds medieval weapons and survival items to Minecraft, enhancing your combat and survival experience with unique tools inspired by historical warfare.

![War weapons banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ccc9452bc2062864d599e526d3af05c6b9ca2b3b.jpeg)

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/Oh_6Zr1-G5c" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
## Features

### **Battle Axe**:
- A powerful axe for close combat.
- When used to strip logs, it drops wood bark in addition to the stripped wood.
- Ideal for efficient wood processing and gathering resources.

### **Khukuri**:
- A curved blade favored by Gurkha warriors.
- Cannot damage mobs, but has unique mechanics for player combat.
- Perfect for PvP scenarios or specialized combat styles.

### **Dried Meat**:
- Preserved meat that grants strength when consumed.
- Provides a survival food option with beneficial effects.

### **Wood Bark**:
- Dropped when stripping wood with the Battle Axe.
- Can be used as fuel in furnaces or for composting.
  ![Composting barks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e08e79339a5904a653a5682682226a946798a5ee_0.webp)
- Adds an extra layer of utility to wood stripping.

## Recipes

- _Battle Axe_: Crafted using iron ingots and sticks in a specific pattern.
  ![Battle Axe crafting screenshot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/138e7e7388722e541219d5c178b7a079589727d0.png)
- _Khukuri_: Crafted with iron ingots in a curved blade design.
  ![Khukuri crafting screenshot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/605e95a34a544bf317b1695f2f3d811e42e0cf5b.png)
- _Dried Meat_: Created by drying raw meat in a furnace or smoker.
  ![Creation of dried meat](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8b7e0c6769a33682dc3cd1fd6ab24edf3e344a75.png)
- _Wood Stripping_: All types of wood logs can be stripped using the Battle Axe to yield stripped wood and wood bark.
  ![Stripping log with battleaxe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/04b024aa5e845c8fc3aeb4b8e1369cc38b9574f3_0.webp)

## Compatibility

- Minecraft Java Edition ~1.21.11
- Requires Fabric Loader >=0.18.4 and Fabric API
- Java >=21

Thank you for using War Weapons. Enjoy your vanilla + Minecraft adventures!
